title: G1axScroll
description: Turn your office mouse into a gaming mouse - scroll to rapid click at 20 CPS without expensive hardware!
body:
A lightweight Minecraft client-side mod that converts mouse scroll input into rapid clicks - perfect for players with office mice or budget gaming mice who want to achieve drag clicking or jitter clicking effects without hardware limitations.

## Purpose

Designed for players who:
- Use office/standard mice without dedicated gaming features
- Have budget mice that can't handle drag clicking or jitter clicking
- Want consistent rapid clicking without physical strain
- Need an accessible alternative to expensive gaming mice

## Features

- **Scroll Up** → Rapid left clicks (15-20 clicks per scroll)
  - Only works when holding weapons (swords, axes, or mace)
  - Works with all materials: wooden, stone, iron, gold, diamond, netherite
  - Perfect for PvP combat
  
- **Scroll Down** → Rapid right clicks (15-20 clicks per scroll)
  - Works with any item
  - Great for block placement and interactions

- **Hotbar Lock Toggle** (H key)
  - Locked: Scrolling triggers clicks, hotbar doesn't switch
  - Unlocked: Normal scroll behavior

- **20 CPS** click speed
- **Client-side only** - no server interaction required
- **Always active** when loaded - no commands needed
